title: Fix deployment error in Version 2

requirements.text: Investigate and resolve the error currently preventing the application from functioning properly in the deployed Version 2

quotes: its showing error remove the error and makew it it work

acceptanceCriteria: Application loads without errors in the browser console
Users can successfully register with a display name and receive a unique auth code
Users can log in using their unique auth code
No runtime errors appear when navigating between pages
All existing features (registration, login, connect, chat navigation) function as expected

requirements.text: Verify that the migration logic correctly transforms old user data to the new structure with authCode and sessions map
acceptanceCriteria: Existing users from Version 1 can access their accounts after upgrade
New users can register and authenticate without issues
No data loss occurs during the migration process

requirements.text: Ensure the code-based authentication flow works correctly, including login, logout, and session persistence across page refreshes
acceptanceCriteria: Users remain logged in after refreshing the page
Auth code badge displays correctly in the header when authenticated
Logout functionality clears session and redirects appropriately
Protected routes (connect, chat) are accessible only when authenticated

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity hooks, main.tsx, ui components)
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond fixing the current error
Redesigning the UI or user experience
Implementing chat message storage (noted as under development)
